concept.conceptName: Chloride [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration

en.name: Urinary chloride
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Urinary chloride is the concentration of chloride in a urine specimen — typically a spot (random) urine sample [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit) or mEq/L; the two are numerically equivalent for chloride [2]. ## Included Concepts The set lists two LOINC "Lab Test" concepts measuring the chloride concentration in a spot urine specimen: - *3007733 / 2078-4 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: spot (random) urine sample. Most widely used LOINC code. - *3037311 / 35676-6 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration (LOINC)*: used when the source does not specify whether the sample is spot or timed. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre). Source systems may report `mmol/L` or `mEq/L`; for chloride (a monovalent anion) the two are numerically equal. ## Excluded Concepts The following LOINC concepts that exist for urinary chloride are deliberately not part of this set, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Timed urine collections — different specimen (timed vs. spot) - *3002752 / 21194-6 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760458 / 57340-2 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in 12 hour Urine* - *40760459 / 57341-0 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in 2 hour Urine* ### Excretion rates — different measurand (amount per unit time, not a concentration) - *3006567 / 2079-2 — Chloride [Moles/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *3041519 / 51695-5 — Chloride [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760460 / 57342-8 — Chloride [Moles/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *40762092 / 58999-4 — Chloride [Moles/time] in 18 hour Urine* - *3009032 / 32542-3 — Chloride [Molar amount] in Urine collected for unspecified duration* ### Ratios — different measurand (ratio to another analyte) - *3020355 / 13721-6 — Chloride/Creatinine [Mass Ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *3044312 / 34265-9 — Chloride/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in Urine* - *3043575 / 43221-1 — Chloride/Creatinine [Ratio] in Urine* - *3040335 / 53640-9 — Chloride/Creatinine [Ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *1988213 / 98986-3 — Chloride/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in 24 hour Urine* ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "urinary chloride", "urine Cl", "spot urine chloride" without further specification: `3007733 / 2078-4 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in Urine`. By far the most common LOINC code. - **Source reports a 24-hour (or other timed) urine collection**: do **not** map to this concept set. Timed urinary chloride is out of scope. - **Source reports a chloride-to-creatinine ratio**: do **not** map. These are different measurands. - **Do not confuse with**: chloride in blood (separate concept set, "Chloride in blood"), urinary chloride excretion rate (mmol/24h). ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 2078-4 — Chloride [Moles/volume] in Urine. Available: https://loinc.org/2078-4/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
